src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/config/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated JwtGrantedAuthoritiesConverter with a custom lambda to handle JWT claims manually.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/config/Se.why_exists: JwtGrantedAuthoritiesConverter is deprecated in Spring Security 6.x (required for JDK 21/Spring Boot 3.x) and its configuration methods like setAuthoritiesClaimName are removed or behave differently, causing compilation errors or incorrect authority mapping.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/config/Se.general_idea: Update imports to support the new custom JWT authority conversion logic.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/config/Se.why_exists: The new implementation uses Set, HashSet, GrantedAuthority, and SimpleGrantedAuthority which were not imported, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.general_idea: Add SecurityUtil dependency to enable retrieving the current authenticated user.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'securityUtil' in findByMe method.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.general_idea: Add PageableUtil import to support dynamic pagination creation.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'PageableUtil' in searchUsers and getAllUsers methods.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.general_idea: Add PageResponseDTO import to support pagination metadata in responses.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'PageResponseDTO' in getAllUsers method.

src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.general_idea: Add Spring Data Page and Pageable imports for pagination support.
src/main/java/com/bunary/vocab/controlle.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbols 'Page' and 'Pageable' in method signatures.
